title: Crafty Haven
description: This Minecraft mod pack enhances the game's core blocks, adds furniture mods, includes the Create mod, and introduces various improvements like better sounds and animations.
body: This pack features mods that improve the basic blocks in minecraft, furniture mods, create, and more! You'll also note that there's better sounds and better animations! This pack also offers astetic changing mods such as shaders and distant horizons.
